arts.ttl: ‘6th muscle injury this season’ – Injury-prone worry for Arsenal player can see quick purchase and sale
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Nuno Tavares has been out on loan since the start of the 2022/23 season. Last summer, Arsenal let the Tavares join Lazio on loan with an obligation to buy if certain conditions are met. arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois admits Real Madrid are worried about Arsenal set pieces
arts.sum: Goalkeeper reveals side have trained to deal with them ‘The first thing is not to concede too many corners’ Thibaut Courtois has revealed that Real Madrid are wary of Arsenal’s prowess from set pieces and have been preparing specifically for the challenge of facing them. The reigning European champions come into Tuesday’s first leg of their Champions League quarter-final at the Emirates following a 2-1 home defeat by Valencia in La Liga that left them four points behind leaders Barcelona. A poor defensive performance saw Madrid concede their 10th goal from a corner this season, although Carlo Ancelotti will welcome back Courtois and David Alaba from injury against Mikel Arteta’s side. arts.ttl: Bid prepared: Arsenal line up €30m transfer raid on CL opponents Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly lining up a €30m transfer bid for Real Madrid’s talented young attacking midfielder Arda Guler. The Turkey international has struggled to establish himself as a regular starter during his time at the Bernabeu, despite long being regarded as an outstanding prospect. arts.ttl: 11 players to miss Arsenal vs Real Madrid after Thibaut Courtois update and announcement made
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, having only just returned from injury, has not been included in an Arsenal starting XI since December but after 26 minutes on his return against Fulham followed by 45 minutes in this past weekend's clash with Everton, he is expected to be named from the off. Thibaut Courtois has also been on the sidelines for the last few weeks but is expected to be available and that was confirmed by him being named in Madrid's travelling squad on Monday.
